about: A simple scripting language with a small interpreter written in C++ (2026)
description:
Bronze is based on the scripting language that was implemented in Kodiak, another project of mine. Its interpreter has been redone a few times because I was indecisive about what language to us. It was initially made in C, then in Rust, then in C again and finally C++. Technically I started the project in 2024, but a couple of years without any changes to the project passed before I decided to delete the original project and start over. Still a work in progress. 

Started on 12/2/2024
Released on 3/18/2026
